description: AI Studio – MCP server registry. Source of truth for every IDE/CLI MCP client.

context7.description: Live documentation for libraries (Angular, Nx, RxJS, Vitest, Playwright, ...). Always pull current docs before generating code that touches an external API.

playwright.description: Headless browser automation. Use for E2E debugging, accessibility audits and visual checks.

nx.description: Nx workspace introspection: project graph, generators, executors, affected. Required for the Orchestrator to plan monorepo changes.

angular-cli.description: Angular CLI: ng generate, ng add, schematic catalog, AI-friendly scaffolding hints from angular.dev/ai.

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph (entities, relations, observations) — Anthropic-official. Cross-session persistence: orchestrator state survives between conversations. Memory MCP is documented in .ai/architecture.md §4.

policies.fallback: When an MCP server is unavailable, document the gap in the response and continue with built-in tools — never silently skip the call.
